/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_service_detector.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_service_detector.dir/test_service_detector.cpp.o -o test_service_detector  ../libepiscan_core.a ../libepiscan_network.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/libcurl.so /usr/lib/libcurl.so /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so ../lib/libgtest.a
